hero.description: who designs and builds web products end to end — with visual judgment and an obsession for detail.

about.heading: Hi, I'm
about.name: Andrés
about.paragraph1: I build web applications end to end: from interface design to the API and the database. I move comfortably between front and back end, and I enjoy turning fuzzy problems into clear, fast, well-built products.
about.paragraph2: I work daily with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, PHP, and SQL, and right now I'm going deeper into Next.js to take my projects a step further.

portfolio.title: Valencia Fullstack — this portfolio
portfolio.problem: I needed a fast, bilingual portfolio with its own technical blog, without depending on an external CMS.
portfolio.solution: This very site: Next.js App Router with screaming architecture, MDX content, and Postgres for dynamic data.

contact.heading: Contact me
contact.paragraph1: Every email gets read. Send me whatever message you'd like and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.paragraph2: Tell me your name and a contact email. You won't receive any other kind of communication besides my reply.
contact.altPrompt: Don't want to send an email? Reach me on my socials.
contact.successMessage: Thanks — your message is on its way. I'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorGenericMessage: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a moment.
contact.errorRateLimitedMessage: You're sending messages a bit too fast. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: This page explains what personal data this site stores and why, and how to request its deletion.
privacy.contactStorageBody: When you submit the contact form, we store your name, email address, message, and a hashed version of your IP address (never the raw IP) — kept to help investigate abuse if this form is ever misused.
privacy.engagementBody: Article view counts and reactions are deduplicated using a hashed identifier derived from your IP address and browser, so the same visitor isn't counted twice. We do not set tracking cookies.
privacy.deletionBody: To request deletion of your contact messages or engagement data, email {email} from the address you used, and mention the approximate date of your visit.

blog.fallbackNotice: This article is only available in {language}.
